title: ainsliaea macroclinidioides var. oblonga
intro: Ainsliaea macroclinidioides var. oblonga, also known as the Chinese mountain tea, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Ainsliaea macroclinidioides var. oblonga include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
